title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates:
Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates!
